run_order.description: Load the active agent plan from the API.
Load strategy, safety budget, history, notes, signals, and intervention status.
Verify daily/monthly and per-run-type budget before proceeding; trim scope if exceeded.
Verify no critical intervention triggers before proceeding.
Read portfolio, positions, watchlist quotes, and recent orders via Robinhood MCP.
Load standardized market input bundle checklist (quotes, indices, vol proxy, orders, movers).
Review recent news/events from API; ingest summaries when found externally.
For each symbol you will analyze, load prior actions, cooldowns, position, notes, and signals.
Balanced analysis: consider simulated_buy when entry thresholds are met (see scoring_rules_extra). Otherwise hold. Use market inputs, symbol memory, news, and history.
Call review_equity_order for any would-be live trade; never place unless safety.trading_allowed.
Verify decisions against strategy, safety, cooldowns, freshness, symbol memory, and missing data.
POST completed or failed run with decisions, quotes, usage, and errors.

scoring_rules_extra.rule: simulated_buy is allowed when freshness_checks.ready_for_analysis is true, intervention severity is not high/critical, technical >= 0.58, confidence >= 0.55, and at least one confirmation: (a) SPY or QQQ positive vs prior close, (b) news score >= 0.55 with a named headline in action_rationale, or (c) symbol is a clear relative-strength leader vs QQQ today. Size $200–$350 per entry; max 2 new simulated_buy per run when the lane book is all cash.

When simulated cash is fully unallocated (no positions), do not stay 100% cash through multiple consecutive risk-on sessions — deploy 1–2 core positions (broad index ETF and/or highest-conviction name) when entry thresholds are met.
Do not open new long simulated positions when both SPY and QQQ are clearly negative vs prior close unless a symbol-specific catalyst (news >= 0.55 with named headline) overrides.
Review recent_news and symbol memory news before scoring news component; cite headlines in action_rationale when material.
Every decision must include a clear reason; add review_output for live trade intents when required.

Choose hold or skip only when required inputs are missing/stale, intervention is high/critical, scores conflict, macro event risk is extreme (e.g. CPI/FOMC with hostile tape), or confidence < 0.55. Do not use vague uncertainty to override met entry thresholds.
Use cheaper models for signal_response and reconciliation_only; check usage_budget before deep analysis.
